name: Judge Dredd
text: "I am the law!" — Hero Action: Play the top card of the [[Judgment ]]deck. (Limit once per round.)

name: Joseph Dredd
text: Joseph Dredd begins the game with a [[Judgment]] deck. (See insert.) Setup: Search your deck and discard pile for the Lawgiver upgrade and add it to your hand. Shuffle your deck.

name: Ricochet
text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 4 damage to an enemy. If that enemy has a [[Judgment]] upgrade attached to it, deal 4 damage to another enemy.

name: I Knew You'd Say That
text: Hero Action (thwart): Remove 3 threat from a scheme. Remove 1 additional threat for each [[Judgment]] upgrade in play.

flavor:
"The Law is clear. You broke it. I break you."
-Judge Dredd
name: Judgment Rendered
text: Hero Action (attack/thwart): Deal 3 damage to an enemy or remove 3 threat from a scheme. Play the top card of the [[Judgment]] deck.

flavor: "GAZE INTO THE FIST OF DREDD!" —Judge Dredd
name: The Fist Of Dredd
text: Hero Action (attack/thwart): Play the top card of the [[Judgment]] deck. If it was attached to an enemy, deal 4 damage to that enemy. If it was attached to a scheme, remove 4 threat from that scheme. Ready Judge Dredd.

name: Lawgiver
text: Restricted. Hero Action (attack): Exhaust Lawgiver and choose an enemy → deal 1 damage to that enemy for each [[Judgment]] upgrade in play. This attack gains ranged.

name: Judge's Belt
text: You can control 1 additional [[Weapon]] upgrade that has the restricted keyword. Hero Resource: Exhaust Judge's Belt → generate a [wild] resource for an event.

flavor: "Puts 'em out cold in seconds. No permanent damage." -Judge Dredd
name: Stumm Gas Ammo
text: Restricted. Uses (3 gas counters). Hero Action: Exhaust Stumm Gas Ammo and remove 1 gas counter from it → confuse an enemy.

flavor: "The law cannot turn a blind eye!" —Judge Dredd
name: The Book Of Law
text: Your hero gets +1 THW. Hero Action: Exhaust The Book of Law and choose a [[Judgment]] upgrade in play → move that upgrade to another valid target.

name: Daystick
text: Restricted. Hero Action: Exhaust Daystick → choose to either stun or confuse a minion.

name: Lawmaster
text: Hero Action: Exhaust Lawmaster → Choose a non-[[Elite]] minion. That minion gains vulnerable until the end of the phase. Hero Action: Exhaust Lawmaster → Spend 2 resources of any type, choose an attachment with the text "Hero Action" or "Hero Response" and discard it.

flavor: "Grud help us if this all goes wrong."
name: Chief Judge Hershey
text: Hero Interrupt: When you play a card from the [[Judgment]] deck, ready a [[Tech]] upgrade you control or remove 1 threat from a scheme.

name: Obstruction Of Justice
text: Attach to a scheme. Forced Interrupt: The next time threat would be added to this scheme, shuffle this card back into the [[Judgment]] deck instead.

name: Habitual Offender
text: Attach to a villain. Forced Interrupt: When a boost card is turned faceup, cancel that card's "Boost" ability and all of its boost icons ([boost]), then discard it and shuffle this card back into the [[Judgment]] deck.

name: Illegal Possession
text: Attach to a minion. Forced Interrupt: When attached enemy is defeated, the player who defeated it draws 2 cards. Shuffle this card back into the [[Judgment]] deck.

name: Joint Ops
text: Attach to a friendly character. Attached character gets +1 ATK and +1 THW. Forced Interrupt: At the end of the phase, shuffle this card back into the [[Judgment]] deck.

name: Restrained By Protocol
text: Attach to Judge Dredd. Forced Interrupt: When Judge Dredd uses a basic power, exhaust him and shuffle this card back into the [[Judgment]] deck instead.

name: Backup Not Required
text: Attach to an enemy. Forced Interrupt: The next time this enemy would take damage, increase that damage by 6. Then, shuffle this card back into the [[Judgment]] deck.
